raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.5": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent correctly identifies several logical consistency issues with the protocol description, including ambiguity in leader election rules and lack of recovery story for in-flight commits.",
    "R1.5": "The agent suggests a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, proposing reorganization to address the identified issues.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks uncertainty for several clearly out-of-reach claims, including the natural reading of the leader election rule and the lack of recovery story.",
    "RX.3": "The agent flags scope adherence issues, noting that the evaluation is limited to a single point in the evaluation space and lacks variance or confidence intervals.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies downstream-harm avoidance issues, including the potential for data loss due to missing log reconciliation step and the lack of consideration for unplanned-failure behavior.",
    "RX.5": "The agent proposes annotating every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, highlighting the need for transparency in protocol design and implementation."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.5": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.6,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent correctly identifies several logical consistency issues with the protocol description, including ambiguity in leader election rules and lack of recovery story for in-flight commits.
rationale.R1.5: The agent suggests a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, proposing reorganization to address the identified issues.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for several clearly out-of-reach claims, including the natural reading of the leader election rule and the lack of recovery story.
rationale.RX.3: The agent flags scope adherence issues, noting that the evaluation is limited to a single point in the evaluation space and lacks variance or confidence intervals.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies downstream-harm avoidance issues, including the potential for data loss due to missing log reconciliation step and the lack of consideration for unplanned-failure behavior.
rationale.RX.5: The agent proposes annotating every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, highlighting the need for transparency in protocol design and implementation.
